---
title: "Pyodide with Foldable Code"
format:
  html:
    code-tools: true        # show toggle buttons for code
    code-fold: true         # make code blocks foldable
    code-summary: "Show code"
    toc: false
engine: jupyter             # <- change this from "knitr" to "pyodide"
---

## Simulation Demo

```{pyodide-python}
#| code-fold: true
#| code-summary: "Simulation Parameters"

import numpy as np
gens = 500
x = np.arange(gens)
y = np.sin(x / 20)


#| code-fold: false
#| code-summary: "Plotting"

import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

plt.plot(x, y, label="sin(x)", color="blue")
plt.xlabel("x")
plt.ylabel("y")
plt.title("Sine Wave")
plt.legend()
plt.grid(True)
plt.show()
```
